definition.name: generalised_affine_map
definition.definition: A function f : K → R ∪ {+∞} on a convex set K is a generalised affine map if for all x, y ∈ K and λ ∈ (0,1), f(λx + (1-λ)y) = λf(x) + (1-λ)f(y) whenever both sides are defined. This includes ordinary affine maps (finite-valued) and lower semicontinuous affine functions (used for unbounded Hamiltonians in quantum theory).
